name: ALSCO Bug Bounty
priority_areas: 2FA bypass on Secure Gateway mobile app authentication
File upload bypass (testing extensions outside allowed list)
Royal CMS injection vulnerabilities (XSS, SQLi, OS Command Injection, RCE)
Database extraction or index page modification

target_configs.name: sandbox.securegateway.com
target_configs.testing_instructions:
1. 2FA bypass: Test authentication without receiving SMS/code
2. Upload bypass: Upload files with extensions outside (jpg,jpeg,png,gif,jfif,mp4,doc,docx,pdf,xls,xlsx,ppsx,ppt,pptx,flv,rar,zip,htm,html) that execute in browser
3. Upload detector bypass: Upload .jpg file containing malicious code like [php_uname]
target_configs.notes: Sandbox environment with security features disabled

target_configs.name: sandbox-royal.securegateway.com
target_configs.testing_instructions:
Test Royal CMS against:
- XSS Injection
- SQL Injection (SQLi)
- OS Injection
- Command Injection
- URL Injection
- Remote Code Execution
- Privilege Escalation
Goal: Change index page or download database
target_configs.notes: Royal CMS testing - requires permission for extended testing

out_of_scope: Clickjacking on pages with no sensitive actions
Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) on unauthenticated forms
Attacks requiring MITM or physical access to user's device
Previously known vulnerable libraries without working PoC
Missing best practices in SSL/TLS configuration
Content spoofing without showing attack vector
Bruteforce oracle attacks on unauthenticated endpoints
Missing HttpOnly/Secure flags on non-sensitive cookies
Secure Gateway bypasses (marked as Informative only)
SaaS applications under Secure Gateway Firewall

critical: SQL Injection leading to data breach
high: File upload leading to code execution

reward_tiers.note: All bounty amounts at discretion of ALSCO Bug Bounty team

accepted_impacts: Full account takeover with video demonstration
special_requirements.disclosure_policy: No discussion of vulnerabilities outside program without written consent

eligibility: No public zero-days until 30 days after patch
Not an ALSCO employee or third-party employee
